title: PTO accrual for new hires
text: New hires receive 15 PTO days per year, prorated from their start date. Days roll over up to a cap of 5 unused days into the following year.

title: PTO accrual after two years
text: After two years of continuous service, employees' PTO accrual increases to 20 days per year. The tenure bonus applies on the anniversary of the employee's start date.

title: Remote work policy
text: The remote work policy permits permanent employees to work remotely up to three days per week with written manager agreement.

title: Remote core hours
text: Remote workers must be available during core hours of 10:00 to 15:00 local time. Meetings outside core hours are optional.

title: Expense approval policy
text: Expenses over 50 dollars require manager approval before reimbursement. Approved expense submissions are processed within ten business days.

title: Expense submission process
text: Submit the expense form on the internal portal within 30 days of the original purchase. Late submissions are reviewed case by case.

title: Conference attendance policy
text: Conference attendance requires manager approval at least two weeks in advance. Approved conference expenses follow the standard expense submission process.

title: After-hours IT contact
text: For after-hours IT emergencies, contact the on-call engineer at you@example.com. The on-call rotation publishes its weekly schedule on the IT wiki.

title: Routine IT requests
text: Routine IT password resets and software installs use the self-service portal during normal business hours.

title: New hire orientation
text: All new employees complete orientation during their first week. Orientation covers benefits enrollment, security training, and team introductions.

title: Handbook scope
text: This handbook applies to all permanent staff. Contractors and interns follow a separate addendum maintained by People Operations.

title: Perks and stipends
text: Perks include a monthly wellness stipend and an annual learning stipend that may be applied to books or courses.
